parsed.production_notes: The first three scenes use AI-generated images of a woman that have been animated with lip-sync software, evident from the uncanny smoothness of her face, static body posture, and slightly unnatural mouth movements. The final scene switches to a real human actor recorded on video, matching the AI character's appearance but with natural micro-expressions and fluid movement.

characters.appearance: Indian female, late 20s, medium brown complexion, dark hair tied back. She has a friendly face with expressive eyes and a warm smile.
characters.wardrobe: Casual to smart-casual tops. She wears a purple t-shirt in scene 1, a teal patterned top in scene 2, and a beige v-neck blouse with dark pants in scenes 3 and 4.

scenes.setting: Bedroom, daytime, sitting on a bed with a patterned grey bedsheet.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Indian woman sits cross-legged on a bed covered with a grey patterned bedsheet. She is wearing a dark purple short-sleeved t-shirt and grey sweatpants. Her dark hair is casually tied up in a messy bun. She holds a grey smartphone in her left hand, looking intently at the screen. Her right hand is raised, resting gently near her chin in a thoughtful pose. The background is softly blurred, showing a hint of a window and warm, natural lighting typical of a cozy bedroom. The overall composition is a medium shot focusing on her engagement with the device.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman sitting on a bed, looking at her phone. Overlaid on the video are several graphic elements: 'Day:01' and a red progress bar at 22% in the top left. In the lower center, there are two circular profile icons labeled 'Trisha' and 'Co-Learners' connected by a dotted line. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, translating the spoken dialogue. The visual style suggests an app interface tracking a user's learning journey.

Unknown speaker says: Hi Trisha, I'm Dhanush and I'm from Telangana. What about you? [Hi Trisha, I'm Dhanush and I'm from Telangana. What about you?]

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, sitting on a beige sofa, potted plant in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Indian woman is seated comfortably on a beige sofa in a brightly lit living room. She is wearing a teal, patterned long-sleeved top and large black over-ear headphones. A wire connects the headphones to a smartphone she holds in her left hand. She is smiling broadly and appears to be speaking enthusiastically while looking at the phone screen. Her dark hair is neatly tied back. The background features soft, warm lighting and a blurred potted plant, creating a relaxed domestic atmosphere. The camera frames her in a medium shot.

scenes.visual_description: The woman is now on a sofa wearing headphones, interacting with her phone. The top left corner displays 'Day:07' and a yellow progress bar at 54%. The same 'Trisha' and 'Co-Learners' profile icons are overlaid in the lower center, indicating an ongoing conversation. Subtitles are continuously displayed at the bottom. The overlays maintain the app-like progression theme.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hello, I'm Trisha coming from Kanchipuram. I work in Sales. You also here to learn English? [Hello, I'm Trisha coming from Kanchipuram. I work in Sales. You also here to learn English?]
Unknown speaker says: Yes Trisha, I started practicing 20 days ago. And you? [Yes Trisha, I started practicing 20 days ago. And you?]

scenes.setting: Modern office, daytime, sitting in a black ergonomic chair, glass walls and other workers in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Indian woman sits in a black ergonomic office chair within a modern corporate environment. She is dressed in a smart-casual beige v-neck blouse and dark trousers. Her hair is pulled back neatly. She holds a smartphone in her left hand and gestures slightly with her right hand, smiling as she interacts with the device. The background consists of a bright, contemporary office space with glass partitions, indoor plants, and the blurred figures of other employees working at their desks. The shot is a medium framing, capturing her professional yet approachable demeanor.

scenes.visual_description: The woman is in an office setting, holding her phone. The overlay in the top left updates to 'Day:15' with a green progress bar at 87%. The 'Trisha' and 'Co-Learners' icons remain in the lower center. Subtitles appear at the bottom, showing the dialogue between her and another user. The composite shot emphasizes her continued progress and engagement with the learning platform.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hey, I'm Trisha. Though I'm originally from Kanchipuram, I'm working in field sales in Chennai. So, how long have you been using MySivi? [Hey, I'm Trisha. Though I'm originally from Kanchipuram, I'm working in field sales in Chennai. So, how long have you been using MySivi?]
Unknown speaker says: Hi madam, I'm Rajan. Just now installed this application. [Hi madam, I'm Rajan. Just now installed this application.]
Character A says: Don't worry Rajan. You'll definitely get good at English. Keep practicing daily, okay? So, where's your hometown? [Don't worry Rajan. You'll definitely get good at English. Keep practicing daily, okay? So, where's your hometown?]

scenes.setting: Modern office, daytime, sitting in a black ergonomic chair.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Indian woman sits facing the camera directly, positioned in a black ergonomic office chair. She is wearing a beige v-neck blouse, a delicate gold necklace, and dark trousers. She holds a smartphone with both hands, resting it casually on her lap. She maintains direct eye contact with the lens, displaying a warm, expressive, and engaging smile as she speaks. The background reveals a well-lit, modern office setting with glass walls and the soft, out-of-focus shapes of colleagues in the distance. The framing is a standard medium close-up talking-head shot.

scenes.visual_description: The woman speaks directly to the camera in an office setting. Various text overlays appear dynamically, including 'English pesa partners venumaa' and a large 3D golden text graphic reading '50 LAKHS'. The MySivi app logo pops up briefly. Subtitles in Tanglish are displayed at the bottom throughout her speech. Towards the end, an app store installation pop-up UI appears over the video, prompting the viewer to download the MySivi app.
scenes.audio_transcript:

Character A says: MySivi ல 50 லட்சம் co-learners English கத்துக்கிட்டு இருக்காங்க. [50 lakh co-learners are learning English on MySivi.]
Character A says: இவங்க எல்லாரும் ரொம்ப supportive. [They are all very supportive.]

Character A says: இப்பவே MySivi அ install பண்ணி English பேச ஆரம்பிங்க. [Install MySivi right now and start speaking English.]
